schema.name: BitSightBreaches_CL
schema.description: The BitSightBreaches table contains data breach records from the BitSight API for monitored portfolio companies ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: company_guid
columns.description: GUID of the company that experienced the breach (enriched).

columns.name: company_name
columns.description: Name of the company that experienced the breach (enriched).

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the breach event.

columns.name: breach_date
columns.description: Date the breach event was recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: date_created
columns.description: Date this breach record was created in BitSight.

columns.name: preview_url
columns.description: URL to a preview article about the breach.

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: Breach event category (e.g., Human Error, Hacking).

columns.name: event_type_description
columns.description: Detailed description of the breach event type.

columns.name: severity
columns.description: Numeric severity level of the breach.

columns.name: breached_companies
columns.description: Array of companies directly affected by the breach.

columns.name: dependent_companies
columns.description: Array of dependent companies impacted by this breach.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name assigned during connector setup.
